description: Weekly communal lunch bringing Kebun Baru seniors together for a warm meal and social interaction. Reducing isolation through shared mealtimes.
venueAddress: Blk 165 Ang Mo Kio Ave 4 #01-454, Singapore 560165

title: Health Talk — Heart Health Awareness
description: Health education talk on heart health covering risk factors, diet, exercise and warning signs of cardiovascular disease. Part of Healthier SG partnership.

title: Arts & Craft — Mosaic Art
description: Creative mosaic art workshop where seniors create colourful mosaic designs. Develops fine motor skills and artistic expression in a group setting.

title: Cooking Class — Seasonal Recipes
description: Weekly cooking class where seniors learn seasonal healthy recipes using fresh ingredients. Promotes nutrition awareness and social bonding over food.
venueAddress: Blk 645 Ang Mo Kio Ave 6 #01-4802, Singapore 560645

title: Digital Literacy — Video Calls & E-Services
description: Digital skills workshop teaching seniors to make video calls, use messaging apps and navigate government e-services on their smartphones.
venueAddress: Blk 645 Ang Mo Kio Ave 6 #01-4802, Singapore 560645

title: Seniors National Games Training — Boccia
description: Training sessions for the SportSG Seniors National Games. Seniors practise boccia, table tennis and other adaptive sports in preparation for national competitions.

title: Health Talk — Fall Prevention
description: Educational health talk on fall prevention for seniors covering home safety modifications, exercise for balance and early warning signs. Conducted by healthcare professionals.

title: Intergenerational Programme — Digital Buddies
description: Youth volunteers coach seniors on smartphone skills, social media and video calls. An intergenerational programme building digital confidence and cross-generational friendships.

title: Chinese New Year Celebration
description: Festive Chinese New Year celebration with lion dance performance, yusheng tossing, traditional games and reunion lunch. A joyous community gathering.

title: Arts & Craft — Resin Art Workshop
description: Learn the art of resin crafting — creating coasters, keychains and decorative items using coloured resin. A trendy craft activity adapted for seniors.

title: Health Screening — Community Vital Signs Check
description: Weekly health monitoring including blood pressure, blood glucose and weight checks. Free for all Canberra AAC members. Supporting early detection and chronic disease management.

title: Communal Lunch & Social Hour
description: Weekly communal lunch bringing seniors together for a warm meal and social interaction. Reducing isolation through shared mealtimes at FRCS centre.
venueAddress: Blk 386 Bukit Batok West Ave 5 #01-348, Singapore 650386

title: Intergenerational Reading Programme
description: Students from nearby schools read with seniors in a paired reading programme. Building intergenerational bonds while promoting literacy and cognitive engagement.
venueAddress: Blk 386 Bukit Batok West Ave 5 #01-348, Singapore 650386

title: Digital Literacy — Seniors Go Digital
description: Digital skills workshop helping seniors learn smartphone basics, messaging apps, video calls and online safety. Part of the national Seniors Go Digital initiative.

title: Health Screening — Blood Pressure & Glucose
description: Weekly health screening monitoring blood pressure, blood glucose and weight. Free for all registered AAC members at the Jalan Batu centre.

title: Deepavali Celebration
description: Special Deepavali celebration with Indian cultural performances, henna art, traditional snacks and rangoli making. A festive multicultural gathering for all seniors.

title: Seated Table Tennis
description: Adaptive seated table tennis for stroke survivors. Improves upper-limb coordination, reflexes and social engagement in a supportive rehabilitation setting.

title: Seated Kickboxing
description: High-energy seated kickboxing adapted for stroke survivors and mobility-limited seniors. Builds cardio endurance, core strength and coordination through punching and kicking motions from a seated position.

title: Dance Movement Therapy
description: Therapist-led dance movement therapy at Enabling Village. Uses expressive movement to support emotional processing, body awareness and motor recovery for stroke survivors.

title: Neurologic Music Therapy
description: Evidence-based neurologic music therapy using rhythm, singing and instrument playing to retrain motor function, speech and cognitive skills in stroke survivors.

title: CapCut Digital Video Workshop
description: Digital literacy workshop teaching stroke survivors and seniors to create and edit short videos using CapCut. Covers basic editing, adding text, music and sharing on social media.

title: Adaptive Badminton
description: Modified badminton programme for stroke survivors using lightweight rackets and adapted rules. Improves hand-eye coordination, mobility and provides competitive social engagement.

title: Repair Clinic — Fix-It Skills Sharing
description: Community repair clinic where senior volunteers share DIY fix-it skills. Bring household items for repair — clocks, fans, radios, small appliances. Promotes sustainability and intergenerational knowledge transfer.

title: Drone Soccer Experience
description: Exciting drone soccer experience for seniors. Learn to pilot small drones through obstacle courses in a fun, technology-forward activity that sharpens reflexes and digital confidence.

title: Men's Communal Dining
description: Weekly communal lunch specifically for male seniors. Combats social isolation among elderly men through shared meals, casual conversation and peer support in a relaxed setting.

title: Conversational English Class
description: Beginner-friendly conversational English class for dialect-speaking seniors. Covers everyday phrases for healthcare visits, ordering food, and communicating with younger family members.

title: Exercise for a Good Cause
description: Unique fitness-for-charity programme — every 60 minutes of group exercise earns 100g of rice donated to families in need. Combines physical wellness with community giving.
venueAddress: Blk 166 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #01-216, Singapore 650166

title: Intergenerational CNY Lo-Hei with Kindergarten
description: Special Chinese New Year lo-hei celebration pairing seniors with kindergarten children from a nearby preschool. Includes making mandarin orange crafts and exchanging handmade ang pow packets.

title: Intergenerational Storytime with Preschoolers
description: Seniors read picture books aloud to visiting preschool children, fostering intergenerational bonds. Includes craft activities related to the story themes.

title: Angklung Music Ensemble
description: Weekly angklung (bamboo instrument) ensemble rehearsal. Seniors learn to play traditional Indonesian songs as a group, promoting cognitive stimulation, coordination and cultural appreciation.

title: Community Gardening Programme
description: Therapeutic gardening programme where seniors tend a shared vegetable and herb plot at the HDB void deck garden. Promotes physical activity, social bonding and nutritional awareness.

title: Guided Meditation & Mindfulness
description: Guided meditation and mindfulness session led by trained facilitators. Seniors learn breathing techniques, body scan relaxation and seated meditation for stress relief and mental wellness.

title: Traditional Indo Massage Learning Circle
description: Seniors learn traditional Indonesian massage techniques for self-care and mutual wellness. Covers acupressure points, gentle kneading and joint relief methods for common ailments.

title: Posca Marker Art Workshop
description: Creative art workshop using Posca markers on various surfaces including tote bags, canvas and postcards. Helps stroke survivors regain fine motor control through enjoyable art-making.

title: Community Music Group
description: Inclusive community music group where stroke survivors play percussion instruments, sing and create music together. No musical experience required — builds confidence and social connections.

title: Brisk Walk & Nature Trail
description: Guided brisk walking group through Hougang neighbourhood parks. Trained volunteers lead seniors on a 3km route with rest stops, promoting cardiovascular health and outdoor socialising.
